holdings.infoBox: ACKY is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Brookfield stock at 15.95%, Amazon.com at 15.12%, Uber Technologies at 13.80%, Microsoft at 12.93%, and Restaurant Brands International at 11.32%.

overview.description: The VistaShares Target 15 ACKtivist Distribution ETF (ACKY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in US-listed equities based on the BITA VistaShares ACKtivist Select Index. Additionally, it aims to achieve an annual income target of 15%, distributed monthly, by employing various options strategies ACKY was launched on Sep 9, 2025 and is issued by VistaShares.
